Salesforce Personalization Theory track · 7 modules

Included modules

  1. Setup Personalization
  2. Web Sitemap
  3. Web Schemas
  4. Data Streams
  5. Identity Resolution
  6. Item Data Graphs
  7. Profile Data Graphs

Remaining Partner Workshop labs are covered in the hands-on session.

Developer · Intermediate · ~10 mins

Web Schemas

On This Page
  • Introduction
  • Upload Web Schema
  • Upload Sitemap

Introduction

In this workshop, you will learn about the relationship between the sitemap you created in the Create a Sitemap workshop and a Data 360 web schema.

At the end of this workshop, you will upload a website sitemap and web schema file to the website connector you created in the previous workshop. Together, these files specify which website interaction events to capture and how they are translated before being ingested into Data 360.

Before starting the hands-on exercises in this workshop, watch the video below to build your understanding of web schema concepts and how they work alongside sitemaps.

Enter the password

LearnSPtoday
to play the video.

Upload Web Schema

Download Option in Sitemap Builder

The Sitemap Builder provides an option to review and download the generated sitemap and schema to your local machine for upload to a website connector. However, to ensure consistency and accuracy for subsequent workshop exercises, please use the sitemap and web schema files provided in this exercise, instead of exporting them from Sitemap Builder.

  1. Click the icon from the top setup menu and select Data Cloud Setup.
  2. In the quick find field, enter
    Websites
    and select Websites & Mobile Apps from the navigation menu.
  3. Click the Training Site connector that you created in the previous workshop.
  4. Right-click this link and save the file to your local computer.
  5. Select Upload Files in the Schema panel and select the schema file you downloaded.
  6. Click Save.

Upload Sitemap

  1. Right-click this link and save the file to your local computer.
  2. Select Upload Sitemap in the Sitemap panel.
  3. Select Upload Files in the Upload Sitemap modal window and select the sitemap file you downloaded.
  4. Check the option: I’m sure I want to change my data capture rules.
  5. Click Save.
← Web Sitemap Data Streams →

Partner Enablement — consolidated theory modules only.
